focus: Deep-dive on P0/P1 findings from iter 1-10

findings.summary: Producer contract still carries unsupported semanticModeEnabled / 60-token floor drift and underspecified stale-degraded branches.
Copilot model-visible transport proof is still prose/setup-only, not a hard P0 ship gate with a supported runtime/version floor.
Codex child still omits the wave-2 PostToolUse audit/repair slice and leaves that architecture refinement outside the current implementation contract.

note: No new P0 surfaced; packet is near-converged and should prefer parent-text patching over further architecture churn.
